response.original_title: The Lie Machine: British Mineworkers Take on the Media
response.overview: Made by the Miners Campaign Tape Project during the 1980’s British Miners strike to represent the miners’ side of the controversy. The first part of the show, The Lie Machine: Media and the Miners Strike, focuses on the British media’s portrayal of the miners’ strike and the battle between supporting workers rights and fueling the capitalist economy.
response.title: The Lie Machine: British Mineworkers Take on the Media
